metadata.title: Gabriel Angione — Software Architect & Builder
metadata.description: Software Architect specializing in .NET, DDD, CQRS, and AI-driven development. Founder of Track Signe. Building scalable, knowledge-driven systems.

hero.name: Gabriel Angione
hero.tagline: I design systems, not just software. I build knowledge into scalable architecture and AI-driven products.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The journey of knowledge
about.p1: I'm a Software Architect from Buenos Aires, Argentina, with nearly a decade of experience spanning the entire IT spectrum — from tech support and systems administration to network engineering and full-stack development. I don't just write code: I model domains, design systems, and build software that scales with the organization it serves.
about.p2: Currently at Tec Solutions, I architect and build Web APIs with C# .NET, applying clean architecture principles (DDD, MVC, BFF) and design patterns (CQRS, Mediator, Builder). I work across the full stack with Angular, React, Node.js, Laravel, and manage relational databases including MySQL, Oracle, and PostgreSQL.
about.p3: I'm the founder of Track Signe, a SaaS platform for intelligent verification and tracking in public spaces using QR codes, geolocation, and photographic evidence.
about.p4: My current focus is AI-driven development — leveraging AI agents in DDD/SDD workflows, experimenting with MCP tools, and building AI-integrated user interfaces for maximum efficiency.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: A career built on continuous evolution

tecSolutionsLead.title: Technical Leader
tecSolutionsLead.description: Technical leader and architect driving engineering culture across development teams. Own the full spectrum from knowledge management and internal documentation to hands-on architecture design, code review, and roadmap definition. Act as the single point of reference for engineering decisions, and AI-driven development practices. Mentor and manage the developer staff, aligning technical execution with business objectives.

tecSolutionsDev.title: Software Developer
tecSolutionsDev.description: Development of Web APIs with C# .NET applying clean and scalable architecture patterns (DDD, MVC, BFF, CQRS, Mediator). Management of relational databases: MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL. Unit testing with NUnit. Maintenance and development of new features in Angular, Laravel, React, Node.js, Express and WebSockets. Dockerization of new and existing projects.

caucionesDev.title: Programmer Analyst
caucionesDev.description: Led the development team of Cauciones Digital (Angular & Laravel), a tool for insurance brokers and policyholders that improved policy request processes, client portfolio management, and commissions. Built REST APIs with C# and Laravel, internal MVCs with PHP, and WordPress landing pages. Requirements analysis and ERP development with Visual Basic and SQL Server Stored Procedures.

caucionesAdmin.title: Systems Administrator
caucionesAdmin.description: Led the datacenter migration, including network equipment migration, logical network architecture redesign, and migration from third-party MPLS connectivity to VPN site-to-site tunnels with agencies across Argentina. Migrated to a hybrid environment implementing Virtual Machines, App Services, and SQL Databases in Azure, achieving better performance and reduced costs.

caucionesSupport.title: Tech Support
caucionesSupport.description: Internal user support intern, developing strong soft skills and technical abilities (Windows, Linux, Active Directory, Office 365) which led to being hired as a full-time employee.

trackSigne.title: Track Signe
trackSigne.description: SaaS platform for intelligent registration and verification in public spaces. Features a mobile app with QR scanning, geolocation, and photographic evidence, plus a complete web panel for campaign management with real-time dashboards, interactive maps, and automated reports. Multi-industry: outdoor advertising, insurance claims, and municipal management.

caucionesDigital.title: Cauciones Digital
caucionesDigital.description: Digital platform for insurance brokers and policyholders at Aseguradores de Cauciones. Streamlined policy requests, client portfolio management, and commission tracking. Led the full development team.

ggmFitness.title: GGM Fitness
ggmFitness.description: Technology platform for a calisthenics training center in Ciudadela. Innovating across all aspects and business models of fitness with integrated tech solutions. Currently in active development.

pampazon.title: Pampazon
pampazon.description: Academic project at UBA — a warehouse and logistics management system built with C# featuring deposit management, operations module, and test case validation.

uba.title: BSc in Information Systems of Organizations
uba.institution: University of Buenos Aires — Faculty of Economic Sciences
uba.description: Comprehensive program covering software engineering, databases, networks, information security, project management, accounting, economics, and organizational systems.

bachiller.title: High School Diploma in Economics & Administration
bachiller.description: Foundation in economics, business administration, and accounting principles.

udemy.title: Master Certification in PHP, SQL, OOP, MVC, Laravel, Symfony & WordPress
udemy.description: Comprehensive full-stack training from zero to advanced level. Mastery of PHP with object-oriented programming and MVC pattern. Relational databases with SQL and MySQL. Development of complete web applications. Web layout and best practices.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's build something together
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of something great.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Three.js & passion for knowledge

thinking.title: How I Think
thinking.subtitle: Mental models behind the systems I build

systems.title: Systems over Solutions
systems.description: Every problem is a system. I don't write code to fix a bug — I model the domain, understand the flows, and design the system on solid foundations.

ddd.title: DDD as a Language
ddd.description: Domain-Driven Design isn't a pattern — it's a communication protocol. When code speaks the same language as the business, requirements, architecture, and the team all align.

ai.title: AI as a Collaborator
ai.description: I don't use AI as only a code generator. I use it as a thinking partner: to explore architecture decisions, challenge assumptions, and accelerate the path from idea to working software.

buildLearn.title: Build to Learn
buildLearn.description: The best way to understand a problem deeply is to build something that solves it. Track Signe, GGM Fitness — each project is a lab for real-world systems thinking.

trackSigne.headline: Building intelligent verification for public spaces

problem.title: The Problem
problem.content: Public space monitoring — outdoor advertising, insurance claims, municipal inspections — relied on paper forms and manual processes. No real-time evidence, no verifiable trails, no scale.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.content: Track Signe is a SaaS platform that combines QR code scanning, GPS geolocation, and photographic evidence into a single verified flow. Field agents use a React Native mobile app; managers get real-time dashboards and automated reports on the web panel.

architecture.title: Architecture
points: REST API built with C# .NET, following DDD and Clean Architecture
Multi-tenant SaaS with security design for customer isolation
Angular web panel with real-time dashboards and interactive maps
React Native mobile app for field agents (QR scan, GPS, camera)
PostgreSQL database with event-sourced audit trail
Dockerized infrastructure deployed on Azure

decisions.title: Key Decisions
points: Chose .NET over Node.js for the API: stronger type safety and domain modeling
React Native over Flutter: Multi-Platform Framework and faster iteration, closer to web skillset
PostgreSQL for relational metadata with potential to scale to vector embeddings in the future
Azure App Service for predictable scaling without Kubernetes overhead

caucionesDigital.headline: Modernizing insurance brokers operations at scale

problem.title: The Problem
problem.content: Insurance brokers managed policy requests, client portfolios, and commissions through a fragmented mix of spreadsheets and legacy systems. The process was slow, error-prone, and impossible to scale.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.content: Cauciones Digital is a full-featured web platform that digitizes and automates the entire workflow for PAS and Brokers. Built with Angular on the frontend and Laravel/C# APIs on the backend, integrated with the company's ERP system.

architecture.title: Architecture
points: Angular SPA with modular architecture for different broker roles
REST API in Laravel and microservices in C# for critical business logic
SQL Server database with stored procedures for ERP integration
Azure hosting with CI/CD pipelines

decisions.title: Key Decisions
points: Angular for the frontend given the team's existing expertise
Hybrid Laravel + C# approach to reuse legacy business logic
Role-based access control for brokers, policyholders, and internal staff

metrics.label: Full development team as Tech Lead

ggmFitness.headline: Building the tech stack for a calisthenics training center

problem.title: The Problem
problem.content: Traditional fitness centers use disconnected tools — WhatsApp for bookings, spreadsheets for attendance, cash for payments. GGM Fitness needed a unified platform to manage classes, members, and growth.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.content: GGM Fitness is an integrated platform covering class scheduling, membership management, attendance tracking, and business analytics. Currently in active development.

architecture.title: Architecture
points: Angular frontend with mobile-first design
Node.js + Express REST API
PostgreSQL database hosted on Google Cloud Platform
Google Cloud Run for serverless backend deployment

decisions.title: Key Decisions
points: Node.js + Express for rapid iteration in early stage
Google Cloud Platform for cost-effective hosting at small scale
Angular for consistency with other projects in the portfolio

metrics.label: Live fitness center in Ciudadela, BA

pampazon.headline: A warehouse management system built at UBA

problem.title: The Context
problem.content: Academic project at UBA's Faculty of Economic Sciences — a real-world warehouse and logistics simulation built with C# and WinForms.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.content: Pampazon implements a complete warehouse management system with deposit management, operations module, and full test case validation coverage.

architecture.title: Architecture
points: C# WinForms desktop application
.NET Framework with layered architecture
Comprehensive unit test coverage

decisions.title: Key Decisions
points: WinForms for rapid UI development in a desktop context
Layered architecture to practice separation of concerns
Test-first approach for operations module validation
